verdict: A clean and well-paced Easy chart with natural foot flow, though the intro contains an accidental 3-panel hold that is physically awkward.

issues.problem: Overlapping hold notes create an accidental 3-panel hold (R, L, and U active simultaneously), which is physically impossible to play on a standard single-pad layout without bracket-stepping or using hands, making it highly inappropriate for an Easy chart.
Slightly off-beat step placements during the sparse outro section break the consistent 120 BPM grid alignment established throughout the rest of the chart.
